seoTitle: Belmont vs Bena — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Belmont and Bena. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Belmont and Bena.
heading: Belmont vs Bena — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Belmont, Victoria and Bena, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Belmont has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Bena (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Belmont or Bena safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Belmont has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Bena scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Belmont scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Bena scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Belmont or Bena?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Belmont has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
